title: Sobennikoffia fournieriana
taxonomy: Sobennikoffia fournieriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Sobennikoffia, which is a group of plants endemic to Madagascar. The plant is classified as a succulent and is native to the island's dry forests. The specific classification of Sobennikoffia fournieriana is a member of the subfamily Periplocoideae. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and genetic traits.
